name: Unexpected Textbook Cost
description: A required course suddenly needs another book.

choices.label: Buy it now
choices.description: Protect the class immediately and absorb the hit.

choices.label: Put it on credit
choices.description: Preserve cash now, but deepen the debt problem.

name: Roommate Asks For Help
description: Your roommate is short on cash and asks you to cover a shared expense.

choices.label: Help out
choices.description: You take the short-term hit to keep the peace.

choices.label: Say no
choices.description: You protect your budget, but the apartment gets tense.

name: Extra Shift Available
description: A coworker wants someone to take their shift.

choices.label: Take the shift
choices.description: You need the money, even if the week gets harder.

choices.label: Protect your time
choices.description: You rest a little instead of chasing extra pay.

name: Laptop Charger Breaks
description: Your charger finally gives up during a busy week.

choices.label: Replace it now
choices.description: Painful, but you keep working normally.

choices.label: Borrow one
choices.description: You save money, but lose time and flexibility.

name: Family Sends Groceries
description: A family member drops off food and a few essentials.

choices.label: Accept it
choices.description: You take the help and breathe a little easier.

choices.label: Decline politely
choices.description: You keep your independence, but the budget stays tight.

name: Transit Fine
description: You get caught with a transit card issue on a rushed day.

choices.label: Pay it
choices.description: You settle it quickly and move on.

choices.label: Contest it
choices.description: You might save money, but it eats time and patience.

name: Class Project Week
description: A group project suddenly demands more of your time than expected.

choices.label: Push through
choices.description: You keep everything on track by burning yourself down a bit.

choices.label: Ask for help
choices.description: You share the load, even if progress feels slower.

name: Friend Brings Dinner
description: A friend covers dinner after a rough week.

choices.label: Accept the help
choices.description: You take the meal and recover a little.

choices.label: Stay in and study
choices.description: You keep grinding, but miss the reset.

name: Surprise Lab Fee
description: A class admin page quietly adds a lab charge you did not plan for.

choices.label: Pay from cash
choices.description: You keep the course clean, but your buffer shrinks.

choices.label: Use credit
choices.description: You protect liquidity now at the cost of later pain.

name: Free Campus Meal
description: A campus event is giving out free hot food.

choices.label: Go eat
choices.description: You save a little money and feel human again.

choices.label: Skip it
choices.description: You keep moving, but miss the break.

name: Phone Screen Crack
description: One drop too many and your phone screen gives way.

choices.label: Repair it
choices.description: You take the cost and keep your day-to-day sane.

choices.label: Live with it
choices.description: You save money, but every day gets a little more annoying.

name: Bursary Opportunity
description: A small bursary application window opens with almost no notice.

choices.label: Apply now
choices.description: It costs time, but it could genuinely help.

choices.label: Ignore it
choices.description: You keep your week lighter, but leave money on the table.

name: Group Study Session
description: Your classmates invite you to a focused study block.

choices.label: Join them
choices.description: You feel more prepared, even if it takes some energy.

choices.label: Study solo
choices.description: You keep control of your time, but the pressure stays on you.

name: Sick Day
description: You wake up drained and clearly not at full capacity.

choices.label: Rest and miss work
choices.description: You recover a bit, but the missed money stings.

choices.label: Push through it
choices.description: You force the week forward at a real cost.

name: Tuition Payment Reminder
description: A payment reminder lands in your inbox at exactly the wrong moment.

choices.label: Make a small payment
choices.description: It hurts now, but takes the edge off the debt pressure.

choices.label: Delay it again
choices.description: You keep the cash for the week, but the problem grows.
